---
title: "Collaborators"
description: >-
  Collaborators, contributors, and reviewers of the A=1 Discrete Causal
  Lattice research program, led by Jack D. Menendez.
---

The A=1 Discrete Causal Lattice program is led by Jack D. Menendez.
This page lists current collaborators, contributors, and reviewers
who have agreed to public attribution.

## Principal investigator

**Jack D. Menendez** — author of Papers I and II, maintainer of
`dcl-core` and the series-wide framework. Contact: see the
[contact page](contact.qmd).

## Collaborators

<!-- Add entries below as collaborators agree to public attribution. -->

*No public collaborators listed yet.* If you have been working with
the program and would like to be listed here, see the [contact
page](contact.qmd).

## Reviewers and endorsers

<!-- Add entries below as reviewers / endorsers agree to public
     attribution. -->

*No public reviewers listed yet.*

## How attribution works on this page

Listing here requires explicit consent — each entry includes only
the attribution form (named individual, institution, or anonymised
contributor) that the collaborator has approved.
